_publications._publicationTitle: Evaluation of quality of life in adults with neurofibromatosis 1 (NF1) using the Impact of NF1 on Quality Of Life (INF1-QOL) questionnaire.

_contextSnippet: The mean clinical severity score was 1.95 (SD 0.65)...17 (34%) patients had mild NF1, 16 (32%) had moderate disease and 17 (34%) were rated as severe.
details: Mean clinical severity score 1.95 (SD 0.65); 34% mild NF1, 32% moderate, 34% severe disease
